data.title: Mark Cuban Battles Former Trump Advisor For Suggesting A 'Child Could Do' American Auto Workers Job: Paul Krugman Chimes In On The Controversy — 'He Still Thinks It's 1965'
data.description: Billionaire entrepreneur Mark Cuban and former President Donald Trump advisor Stephen Miller engaged in a heated exchange Wednesday over Trump's recent comments about auto manufacturing and workers' skills, bringing attention to the complexities of modern automotive production in America.

data.title: Apple Had A Hush-Hush Relationship With Tesla's Chinese-Rival BYD For Now-Abandoned Car Plans — Cupertino Poured Nearly $1B Each Year For A Decade Into The Project
data.description: Apple reportedly had a secret partnership with Chinese automaker BYD to develop long-range EV batteries using lithium iron phosphate cells as part of its now-abandoned car project, which cost the tech giant about $1 billion annually over a decade.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Shift Sideways, Dogecoin Jumps As Stocks Hit New Record: Top Analyst Predicts King Crypto To Hit New High In 3-4 Weeks, $90K By Year-End
data.description: Bitcoin saw a halt in its rally, while the king of meme coins, Dogecoin, fared among the biggest gainers Wednesday.

data.title: YouTube's 'Premium Lite' Plan That Removes Some Ads, But Doesn't Offer Any Other Perks Is Rolling Out To More Countries
data.description: YouTube is expanding its "Premium Lite" plan, which offers fewer ads at a lower price than the standard Premium subscription, to more countries including Australia and Germany.

data.title: Amazon Breaks Away From Black And White Monotony To Offer First-Ever Color Kindle: What You Should Know
data.description: Amazon introduced its latest lineup of Kindle devices, including the first-ever color Kindle and the Kindle Scribe, a new e-reader with a stylus.
